# Lightning P2P

> Lightning P2P is a free, open-source Windows desktop app for direct peer-to-peer
> file transfer over QUIC with BLAKE3-verified streaming. No accounts, no cloud
> storage, no file size caps. MIT licensed. Built with Rust, Tauri, iroh, and
> iroh-blobs.

## What it is

- A desktop app for sending files directly from one device to another.
- Uses the iroh library for QUIC transport with direct paths first and relay-assisted
  fallback when NAT or firewall rules block the direct path.
- Uses iroh-blobs for content-addressed, BLAKE3-verified streaming, so the receiver
  validates every byte as it is written to disk.
- Recommended Windows install path is the Velopack one-click setup. Release
  builds code-sign Windows binaries with Authenticode when Trusted Signing
  secrets are configured, and Tauri updater metadata is signed separately.
- MIT licensed. Source at https://github.com/Kerim-Sabic/lightning-p2p.

## What it is not

- Not a cloud file host. Files are never uploaded to a third-party storage bucket.
- Not a WebRTC-based app. Transport is QUIC via iroh, not WebRTC data channels.
- Not a WeTransfer-style hosted link service. Tickets resolve only while the sender
  is online.
- Not account-based. There is no sign-in, no email capture, no paid tier.

## How it compares

- Magic Wormhole: similar direct-transfer model, Lightning P2P adds a Windows GUI,
  drag-and-drop, receive links, QR codes, and a transfer history.
- LocalSend: LAN-focused, cross-platform. Lightning P2P is Windows-first today but
  works across LAN and WAN (via iroh relay fallback).
- WeTransfer: Lightning P2P does not upload to a server; transfers stream directly.
- Snapdrop / PairDrop: browser-only, LAN-only; Lightning P2P is a native Windows app
  with WAN support.

## Documentation

- [Home](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/)
- [Download](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/download)
- [Receive handoff](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/receive)
- [Security model](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/security)
- [Benchmarks methodology](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/benchmarks)
- [How to send large files](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/how-to-send-large-files)
- [Best P2P file transfer](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/best-p2p-file-transfer)
- [WeTransfer alternative](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/wetransfer-alternative)
- [Magic Wormhole alternative](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/wormhole-alternative)

- [Send files between Windows computers](https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/send-files-between-windows-computers)
